---
title: "Week 07: External data"
---

## Introduction

Coming soon!

## Recommended readings

- [Python tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/) - Official Python documentation

## Lectures

- [**Slides: Working with data**](../slides/IS4010_W07_Working_with_Data.qmd)

- [Lab 07: External data](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-course)
